title: Login and reach the dashboard
description: Verifies that a valid admin login grants access to the dashboard and protected sections in the same session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the dashboard is displayed
Click the link to open inventory
Verify the inventory page is displayed

title: Block protected pages without login
description: An unauthenticated user is prevented from viewing protected POS, purchase, and directory pages.

steps.description: Navigate to /pos
Verify access to the POS checkout is blocked
Navigate to /sales
Verify access to sales history is blocked
Navigate to /purchases
Verify access to purchases is blocked
Navigate to /customers
Verify access to customers is blocked
Navigate to /suppliers
Verify access to suppliers is blocked

title: Access protected pages after login
description: An authenticated user can log in once and navigate to protected sections without losing the session.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the dashboard
Click the link to open inventory
Click the link to open POS checkout
Click the link to open purchases
Click the link to open customers
Click the link to open suppliers
Verify the protected sections remain accessible in the active session
Verify the protected pages render successfully

title: Block dashboard access without a session
description: Verifies that an unauthenticated user cannot view dashboard content and is routed to the login screen.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify access to dashboard content is blocked
Verify the login screen is displayed

title: Create a completed POS sale
description: A sales operator can select a customer, add items, apply adjustments, complete payment, and see the sale recorded in sales history.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the POS checkout
Select or create a customer for the sale
Add one or more products to the cart
Apply a discount and tax to the sale
Confirm the payment for the sale
Click the link to view sales history
Verify the completed sale appears in sales history
Verify the sales history table is displayed

title: View inventory details and part data
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can inspect the inventory list and see part, stock, and barcode-related information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open inventory
Verify the inventory list is displayed
Verify part and barcode data are visible

title: Complete a purchase invoice
description: A purchasing clerk can start a new purchase, choose a supplier, enter item details, confirm the invoice, and see it recorded in purchases.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open purchases
Click the link to start a new purchase invoice
Select a supplier for the invoice
Enter item details for the purchase invoice
Confirm the purchase invoice
Click the link to return to purchases
Verify the new purchase appears in the purchases ledger
Verify the purchases ledger is displayed

title: Record a sale and verify it appears in history
description: A completed POS transaction is preserved and visible when the user opens sales history after checkout.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the POS checkout
Select or create a customer for the sale
Add a product to the cart
Confirm the payment for the sale
Click the link to view sales history
Verify the completed transaction is visible in sales history
Verify sales history is populated

title: Open low-stock items from the dashboard
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can review low-stock alerts from the dashboard and reach the low-stock list.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to view low-stock items
Verify low-stock items are displayed
Verify inventory alert information is visible

title: Manage customer selection during checkout
description: A sales operator can start checkout, search for an existing customer or create a new one, and continue with that customer attached to the sale.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the POS checkout
Open the customer selector in the checkout flow
Search for an existing customer or create a new customer
Verify the selected customer is attached to the current sale
Verify checkout can continue with the chosen customer

title: Review customer statements
description: An authenticated user can open the customer directory and review customer balances and ledger activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open customers
Verify the customer list is displayed
Verify customer balance and ledger activity are displayed

title: Review supplier statements
description: An authenticated user can open the supplier directory and review supplier balances and ledger activity.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open suppliers
Verify the supplier list is displayed
Verify supplier balance and ledger activity are displayed

title: Review low-stock items
description: Verifies that an authenticated user can open the low-stock view and see items below the safety threshold.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open low-stock items
Verify the low-stock list is displayed
Verify low-stock quantities are visible

title: View accounting reports as an authenticated user
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open accounting reports and review balance sheet and income statement information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the accounting page
Verify balance sheet information is displayed
Verify income statement totals are displayed

title: Update application settings and save the changes
description: This test verifies that an authenticated administrator can open settings, change application preferences, and see the updated configuration reflected in the UI.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the settings page
Change an application preference to a valid new value
Save the settings
Verify the updated setting is displayed
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Record an operational expense and see the cash balance update
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can create an expense entry and then see the updated cash balance in the expenses workflow.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the expenses page
Create a new expense entry with valid details and submit it
Verify the new expense entry is displayed
Verify the cash balance is updated

title: Review user and printer preferences in settings
description: This test verifies that an authenticated administrator can view user settings and printer options in the settings manager.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the settings page
Verify user settings are displayed
Verify printer options are displayed

title: Review existing expenses in the cashbox view
description: This test verifies that an authenticated user can open the expenses page and review existing expense and cashbox information.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the link to open the expenses page
Verify expense records are displayed
Verify cashbox balance information is displayed

title: Reject invalid credentials
description: Verifies that submitting invalid login credentials keeps the user on the login screen and shows an authentication error.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the username field with invalid-user
Fill in the password field with invalid-password
Submit the login form
Verify an authentication error is visible
Verify the login screen remains visible

title: Protect settings from unauthenticated access
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated user cannot access settings and is redirected or denied access.

steps.description: Navigate to /settings
Verify access is denied or the login screen is shown

title: Protect accounting reports from unauthenticated access
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated user cannot access accounting reports and is redirected or denied access.

steps.description: Navigate to /accounting
Verify access is denied or the login screen is shown

title: Protect the expenses page from unauthenticated access
description: This test verifies that an unauthenticated user cannot access the expenses page and is redirected or denied access.

steps.description: Navigate to /expenses
Verify access is denied or the login screen is shown
